enrichment.summary: Kyle responds to a viewer request asking about THC enemas and suppositories, sharing his opinions on their effectiveness and comparing them to other methods of cannabis consumption. He also addresses a viewer question about a brand/tattoo on his shoulder, which he reveals is a marijuana leaf brand he gave himself.
enrichment.speaker: kyle

stances.position: Enema would get you high faster due to direct bloodstream absorption; suppository wouldn't get you that high

stances.topic: putting pot in your butt to get high
stances.position: Thinks it's extreme and unnecessary — lungs are the way to get high, butt is for smuggling
Considers it a joke request and asks future requesters to be more sensible

entities: marijuana leaf brand/tattoo on Kyle's shoulder
